# Dependabot Close Comment

Closing this Dependabot PR because its changes have been consolidated into the gui-integration dependency branch and validated there.

Standard policy for this repository:

- Node dependency updates are grouped and targeted to gui-integration
- obsolete single-package or legacy-path Dependabot PRs are closed
- stale Dependabot branches are deleted after closure

If needed, the update will be reintroduced through the grouped Dependabot flow configured in .github/dependabot.yml.
